scripts.build: pnpm --filter @data-engine/schema run build && pnpm --filter @data-engine/adapter run build && pnpm --filter @data-engine/adapter-knex run build && pnpm --filter @data-engine/api run build && pnpm --filter @data-engine/migration run build && pnpm --filter @data-engine/engine run build
scripts.verify: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck
